description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a prominent brown headband and large, cushioned ear cups. The headband appears to be padded and covered in a leather-like material, providing comfort for extended use. The ear cups are circular and feature a combination of brown and black finishes, with the outer shell likely made of plastic or metal and the padding covered in a soft material. The headphones have visible hinges connecting the ear cups to the headband, allowing for some adjustability. There are no visible wires, suggesting a wireless design, and no branding or logos are apparent on the exterior. The overall construction looks robust, suitable for personal audio use in urban environments.
description: A pair of brown over-ear headphones with cushioned ear cups and a padded headband, featuring a mix of leather-like and plastic materials. The design is wireless and robust, ideal for personal audio use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, cushioned ear cups and the padded headband arching above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup and the width of the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the ear cups and the headband's curve.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the ear cup and headband profile visible.
